items.title: Deprecation of People Profile in the Employee Central Employee History Field Mapping Tool
items.description: The capability to map from People Profile as an Employee Central Category when using the Employee Central Employee History Field Mapping tool will reach the end of maintenance on May 15, 2026 and will be deleted on May 14, 2027.
items.plainEnglish: ⚠️ This feature is being retired and affects your system automatically. Plan your migration path before the deletion date. Check the timeline in the description and identify alternatives now.

items.title: Deprecation of variablePayUpdateForms Job
items.description: variablePayUpdateForms job will reach end of maintenance on May 15, 2026 and will be deleted on May 14, 2027.
items.plainEnglish: ⚠️ This feature is being retired and affects your system automatically. Plan your migration path before the deletion date. Check the timeline in the description and identify alternatives now.

items.title: Automated Deletion of Future-Dated Job and Compensation Information Records After Employment Termination
items.description: As an administrator, you can now let the system automatically remove any existing future-dated Job Information and Compensation Information records dated after an employment is terminated. The system uses the Termination Date from Job Information, which means the effective start date of the inactive record.
items.lifecycle: Employee Central CompensationHire, Rehire, and TerminationJob Information
items.latestRevision: Automated Deletion of Future-Dated Job and Compensation Information Records After Employment Termination (1H 2026)
items.plainEnglish: New feature available — you can enable it when ready. Review to see if it simplifies your workflows. Test in non-production first.

items.title: Introducing Country/Region-Specific Dependent Configuration
items.description: We're introducing the Country/Region-Specific Dependent Configuration feature as an enhancement to the existing Dependents Management solution. You can now customize the data collection and management for employees' dependents, such as their spouses or children, based on different countries/regions and dependent types. For 1H 2026 release, this feature can only be enabled if you don't have existing dependent data in your system.
items.lifecycle: Employee Master Data ReplicationGlobal BenefitsPeople ProfilePersonal InformationStory Reports
items.plainEnglish: 🆕 Major new capability available. This could significantly change how you work. Review the configuration steps and test in your sandbox first.

items.title: Job Information Record ID Available in OData API EmpJob
items.description: As an administrator, you can now access Job Information record IDs through the newly added property objectId in OData v2 API EmpJob for more reliable change tracking and integration.
items.plainEnglish: Minor update available. You can configure this if beneficial. Low urgency — review during your next release cycle.

items.title: Enhancements in Employment
items.description: We've introduced several enhancements this release to improve implementation and management of the employment lifecycle.
items.lifecycle: Concurrent EmploymentContingent WorkforceGlobal AssignmentHire, Rehire, and Termination
items.plainEnglish: Minor update available. You can configure this if beneficial. Low urgency — review during your next release cycle.

items.title: Deprecation of Basic Authentication for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integrations
items.description: Basic Authentication for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central integrations reached end of maintenance on June 2, 2023 and will be deleted on November 20, 2026.
items.plainEnglish: ⚠️ This feature is being retired and affects your system automatically. Plan your migration path before the deletion date. Check the timeline in the description and identify alternatives now.

items.title: Enhancements to AI-Assisted Explain My Pay Statement for Employee Central Payroll Based on SAP Human Capital Management for SAP S/4HANA
items.description: You can use Joule to get an explanation of your most recent pay statement or to compare it with the previous pay statement. This feature is now available for Brazil in Portuguese and for Canada in English and French.
items.version: Contact Customer Engagement Executive or Account Manager
items.plainEnglish: Minor update available. You can configure this if beneficial. Low urgency — review during your next release cycle.

items.title: Replication of Public Sector Cost Objects in Time Sheet to Employee Remuneration Info (2010) Infotype
items.description: SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking now enhances Time Pay Components with cost object information received from the S/4HANA Consolidated Time Recording (CTR) to support payroll processing. This additional cost data is also replicated to infotype 2010 in an SAP Payroll system for further processing.
items.lifecycle: Public Sector ManagementTime Data ReplicationTime Sheet
items.plainEnglish: New feature available — you can enable it when ready. Review to see if it simplifies your workflows. Test in non-production first.

items.title: Consolidated Time Recording for Public Sector
items.description: You can now use a consolidated timesheet in the cloud that integrates SAP S/4HANA MyTimesheet with SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking for regulated industries.
items.plainEnglish: 🆕 Major new capability available. This could significantly change how you work. Review the configuration steps and test in your sandbox first.

items.title: Enhancements to Business Process Engine
items.description: Two configurations for Business Process Engine are now available in Admin Center and all business process to-do tasks now appear in the For You Today section on the latest home page.
items.plainEnglish: New feature available — you can enable it when ready. Review to see if it simplifies your workflows. Test in non-production first.

items.title: Category Hiding During Feedback Recall in 360 Reviews
items.description: As an administrator, you can now configure 360 Review templates to hide the rater category when a rater recalls and edits their feedback.
items.plainEnglish: 🆕 Major new capability available. This could significantly change how you work. Review the configuration steps and test in your sandbox first.

items.title: Enhancements to Performance Preparation Agent - April 2026
items.description: We've made the following enhancements to the Performance Preparation Agent.
items.plainEnglish: Significant change needing your attention. Plan configuration updates and communicate to affected users.

items.title: Integration Center Performance Improvements
items.description: As an administrator, you benefit from improved system performance through enforced weekly job thresholds in Integration Center. The system automatically manages job scheduling by limiting weekly jobs to 150 and reclassifying frequent jobs to optimize resource allocation.
items.plainEnglish: Minor update available. You can configure this if beneficial. Low urgency — review during your next release cycle.

items.title: Deprecation of User Login Using Employment Username
items.description: We're deprecating basic authentication user login using SuccessFactors employment username and password by May 15, 2026. We request that all customers still using basic authentication to migrate to Identity Authentication in SAP Cloud Identity Services for authentication instead since basic authentication will be deprecated by November 13, 2026. For those customers that continue to use basic authentication before Nov 13, 2026 and are still using employment username login, we request that these customers migrate to use account login name for login.
items.plainEnglish: ⚠️ This feature is being retired and affects your system automatically. Plan your migration path before the deletion date. Check the timeline in the description and identify alternatives now.

items.title: Deprecation of SAP SuccessFactors - WorkForce Software Integration Package
items.description: The integration package that supports integration of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with Time and Attendance Management by WorkForce Software will reach End of Development on May 15, 2026.
items.plainEnglish: ⚠️ This feature is being retired and affects your system automatically. Plan your migration path before the deletion date. Check the timeline in the description and identify alternatives now.

items.title: Data Export in View Mode for Story Reports
items.description: This feature is no longer available for 1H 2026. Users with view-only access to a story can now export data from Story page directly in view mode.
items.plainEnglish: 🆕 Major new capability available. This could significantly change how you work. Review the configuration steps and test in your sandbox first.

items.title: Release Center Adds What's New to Admin Center
items.description: The Release Center streamlines your 1H and 2H release management process because its tenant aware, offers collaboration tools, and has built-in leading practice workflows.
items.plainEnglish: New feature available — you can enable it when ready. Review to see if it simplifies your workflows. Test in non-production first.

items.title: Enhanced People Search Adoption in More Areas
items.description: The enhanced People Search is now available in more areas, providing a modern and consistent search experience across SAP SuccessFactors.
items.plainEnglish: New feature available — you can enable it when ready. Review to see if it simplifies your workflows. Test in non-production first.

items.title: Enhancements to Request Feeback and Give Feedback Quick Actions in SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone
items.description: SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone now uses the enhanced feedback dialogs for requesting and giving feedback, offering improved layout and guided input.
items.plainEnglish: Minor update available. You can configure this if beneficial. Low urgency — review during your next release cycle.

items.title: Enhancements to Data Viewing in Full Profile
items.description: The redesigned data viewing experience of Full Profile is now universally available for all customers. We've also added several enhancements to the data viewing experience with Full Profile cards.

items.title: Permission Changes for Reward Statements on Latest People Profile
items.description: The Full Profile data viewing experience is now available to all customers. The Full Profile handles permission to view Compensation category cards differently than the legacy People Profile does.
items.plainEnglish: Significant change needing your attention. Plan configuration updates and communicate to affected users.
